zh.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod是Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby的女兒，於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭。她於大約1226年與Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1256年在英國斯塔福爾布羅姆利享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod是Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby的女儿，于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰。她于大约1226年与Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1256年在英国斯塔福爾布羅姆利享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod was born about 1210, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby. She married Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley about 1226, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1256, in Bromley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod est née environ 1210, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley environ 1226, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1256, à Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod wurde um 1210 in England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby geboren. Sie hat um 1226 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bromley, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod è nata il circa 1210 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley circa 1226, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1256, nel Bromley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigodは約1210年にイギリスイギリスでSir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derbyの娘として生まれた。約1226年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1256年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロムリーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod(은)는 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 스태퍼드실르 브롬리에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley aproximadamente 1226, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Alicia Bigod родилась около 1210 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir William II Ridware -le Seneshcal of Ferrers, Earl of Derby. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Bagot, Lord of Bromley около 1226 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1256 г. в местности бромли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.
